ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU

DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT IN THE AMOUNT OF $340, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT. NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC.'s
Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
